main.description: An event where organism occurrence data is collected according to a Protocol. Organism presence is recorded with Occurrence records with eventID set to the Survey's at-uri and surveyTargetID set to one of the Survey's Protocol's SurveyTarget at-uris.

protocol.description: Protocol followed when conducting this survey.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this survey was originally created.

surveyorCount.description: Total number of people conducting the Survey.

samplingPerformedByID.description: DIDs of participants in addition to the record owner (sensu Humboldt eco:samplingPerformedBy).

eventDate.description: Date or datetime the survey began, ISO 8601 supporting partial forms (e.g. 2026, 2026-02, 2026-02-03, 2026-02-03T00:01:02Z).

eventDurationValue.description: Duration of the survey in units specified by eventDurationUnit (sensu Humboldt eco:eventDurationValue).

location.description: Geographic location where the survey was conducted.
